name: RPlog_talk_Surprise_Gastus_Went_Boom
title: Talk Page: Quibbling Over Galactic Geography
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page for the Surprise Gastus Went Boom log. Lolkje explains the log comes from her records of New Republic history and was originally recorded by Han Solo or Arands. Danik Kreldin thanks her and asks for more logs, while Hawke challenges a line about the Deliverance flying to Caspar space to be closer to Gastus, pointing out the planets sit on opposite sides of the Slice and cautioning against trusting the MUSH's coordinate system. Lolkje agrees to edit the questionable references. The discussion is entirely editorial, concerning galactic geography and log provenance with no in-character content.
